ARTICLE_TITLE: Son Heung-min Leads Tottenham to Europa League Final with Hat-trick Against AC Milan
ARTICLE_BODY: Tottenham Hotspur captain Son Heung-min delivered a stunning performance in the Europa League semi-final second leg against AC Milan, scoring a hat-trick to secure a 4-1 victory and book Spurs' place in the final. The Korean forward's clinical finishing proved decisive as Tottenham overturned a 2-0 first-leg deficit. Son opened the scoring in the 15th minute with a perfectly placed curler before adding two more goals in the second half. His performance has been hailed as one of the finest in European competition this season. Korean football fans celebrated throughout the night, with viewing parties held across Seoul. The victory makes Son the first Asian player to score a hat-trick in a Europa League semi-final. Tottenham will face Real Sociedad in the final on May 22nd in Dublin. Son's remarkable form continues to elevate Korean football's global profile, inspiring a new generation of young players across the country.
